user.title: Select Authentication Method
user.description: Choose how to authenticate with SmartThings

pat.title: Personal Access Token
pat.description: Enter your SmartThings Personal Access Token (PAT) and Device ID

oauth_code.title: Enter Authorization Code
oauth_code.description: Please visit {auth_url} to authorize the app, then copy the code from the redirect URL and paste it below.

error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Please check your credentials.
